fields.description: As a user, I want to log in so I can access my account.
fields.acceptanceCriteria: User can log in with valid credentials.

fields.description: As a user, I want to reset my password so I can regain access if I forget it.
fields.acceptanceCriteria: User receives reset email and can set a new password.

fields.description: As a user, I want to update my profile information.
fields.acceptanceCriteria: User can update name and email.

fields.description: As a user, I want my account to lock after 5 failed logins.
As a user, I want to verify my email.
fields.acceptanceCriteria: User receives verification email and can activate account.
